fragments.html_content:
Payment Terms:

To secure your installation, a 10% deposit is required. The remaining 90% is due upon completion of the fence.

 

For custom aluminium gates, your invoice will be divided into three payments:

  1. The initial 10% deposit.

  2. The fencing and labour costs, due upon completion of the fence.

  3. The final payment for the custom aluminium gates and motor, due once installation of the gates has been completed (approximately 4 weeks after the fence installation).

If you wish to proceed, please approve your proposal, and we will promptly send an invoice for your deposit.

Please allow 1 business day for the invoice to arrive. If you haven't received it by then, kindly check your spam/junk folder. If you still don't see it, feel free to contact us by phone or email.

fragments.html_content:
Terms and Conditions

1. Validity

This Proposal is valid for 30 days from the issue date. If more than 30 days have elapsed and you require an updated proposal, please contact us.

2. Fence Clearance

All our fences come with a standard gap underneath the panel, ranging from 50mm to 80mm.
Should you wish to reduce this gap by adding additional rails, we can provide a customised quote. Please be aware that, due to potentially uneven ground, small gaps may still occur.

3. Signage During Installation

During the installation period, a temporary A2 size sign will be positioned at the property's front.
This sign will remain in place until the installation concludes or until the sliding gate is installed. We find this reduces the inconvenience to the property owner by addressing inquiries proactively.
Please inform us if you foresee any issues with this arrangement.

4. Payment Terms and Collection Costs

Final payment is due upon completion of the fence, with a 5-business-day grace period for funds to clear. If you anticipate any difficulty in meeting this timeframe, please inform us in advance.


In the event of non-payment and failure to communicate regarding the outstanding balance, Queensland Fencing Specialists reserves the right to take further action, including but not limited to legal proceedings or the engagement of a third-party debt collection agency.


You agree that any expenses, costs or disbursements incurred by Queensland Fencing Specialists in recovering any outstanding monies, including debt collection agency fees and solicitor costs, shall be paid by you in addition to the original debt.

5. Boundary Markers

The survey pegs are the primary indicators of the boundary line.
In the event that none are found along the fence line, we will either follow the existing fence line or, if there is no current fence, measure from the curb to your neighbour’s fence to ensure a consistent distance along your boundary.

6. Installation Timing

Upon invoicing, we will provide an approximate installation date.
While we will make every effort to adhere to this schedule, delays may occur due to industry demands and weather conditions.
Confirmation of the exact date will be emailed the week before the scheduled installation.

7. Removal of Old Fence

This proposal does not include the removal and disposal of the old fence unless specified.
If we have not quoted removal and disposal, the owner is responsible for clearing the new fence line with a 300mm clearance on either side.
If our installers arrive and find this line uncleared, our installer may undertake removal and disposal at a minimum fee of $25 per linear meter to avoid work delays.

8. Fence Alignment on Uneven Land

Unless specified otherwise in this proposal, fencing will follow the lay of the land, requiring raked or stepped adjustments.
For a continuously level fence on uneven land, additional materials and labour costs will need to be quoted.

9. Customer Cancellation

In the event of a customer-initiated cancellation, a processing fee of $300 will be deducted from the refunded deposit.

10. Landscaping Notice

Although we will make every endeavour to safeguard the landscape, it's important to note that the use of excavators during construction may lead to minimal disruption, including potential lawn and plant damage in the vicinity.
Your understanding in this matter is greatly appreciated.

11. Custom Aluminium Gates

For custom aluminium gates, a 2-part installation process is followed:

  • Precise measurements are taken after the fence installation

  • Approximately 4 week waiting period for fabrication and installation

The property owner is responsible for arranging an appropriate power point installation or engaging an electrician as per inspector instructions.

With low-voltage motors, please leave them plugged in, as sudden unplugging can lead to faults with the battery and settings, resulting repairs will not be covered under warranty and will be charged accordingly.

12. Augering Conditions

Unless stated otherwise, this quoted installation cost does not cover extra or above-effort augering through obstructions like rock holes or tree stumps.

Additional fees, starting from $30 per hole, may apply and will be advised by the Installer if required..

13. Excluded Items

Not included in the cost unless stated otherwise:

  • Additional soil for yard grading/levelling

  • Turf/seed

  • Moving/relocating soil from holes

  • Repair/relocating plumbing or electrical fixtures

While all care is taken to avoid damage to these services, the Installer will promptly advise if any cables are encountered.

 

Acceptance of Terms

By signing below, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to the above Terms and Conditions,

fragments.html_content:
Warranty Information

We at QFS are committed to delivering quality and assurance in our services and products. Alongside the warranties provided:

  1. Product Warranty (PVC Components):
    30 Year Manufacturer's warranty against fading or cracking from the sun.

  2. Installation Warranty (Labour):
    12-month coverage for installation defects, aligning with QBCC standards, activated upon full payment.

  3. Manufacturer’s Warranty for Sliding Gate:
    24-month coverage for material and workmanship defects, under manufacturer’s terms.

  4. CENTSYS Manufacturer Warranty:

    • 24-month warranty for motors

    • 6-month coverage for internal batteries
      We offer a 12-month guarantee on the motor without additional call-out fees.
      In the second year, we assess issues on a case-by-case basis. The manufacturer will initially address any concerns, but should you require QFS's intervention, call-out fees may apply.

  5. Sliding Gate Motor Installation Warranty (Labour):
    24-month defect coverage in workmanship, effective with full payment.

For detailed policy information, please refer to the CENTSYS warranty at
CENTSYS Warranty Service:
https://qga.com.au/warranty-service/
